SGO Est. Orlando, FL

Waheguru's
Home in Orlando

ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆਂ ਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ

The Sikh Gurdwara of Orlando is a sacred space of learning, worship, and community for the Sangat of Central Florida. Rooted in the teachings of the ten Gurus and the eternal Guru Granth Sahib Ji, we strive to serve all people with humility and love.

Our Gurdwara welcomes all — regardless of faith, background, or origin. Whether you seek spiritual solace, community fellowship, or simply a warm meal through Langar, our doors are always open.

Naam Japo
ਨਾਮ ਜਪੋ
Kirat Karo
ਕਿਰਤ ਕਰੋ
Vand Chhako
ਵੰਡ ਛਕੋ
Seva & Simran
ਸੇਵਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਿਮਰਨ
Daily & Weekly Programs

Diwan & Seva Timings

Join us for Nitnem, Kirtan, Katha, and Langar. All are welcome at every service.

Daily — Monday to Friday
Morning Nitnem
ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵੇਲਾ
5:00 – 7:00 AM
Amrit Vela Nitnem & Simran. Start your day with Gurbani.
Daily
Evening Rehras
ਰਹਿਰਾਸ ਸਾਹਿਬ
6:30 – 8:00 PM
Evening Rehras Sahib paath followed by Ardas and Hukamnama.
Daily
Langar Seva
ਲੰਗਰ
12:00 – 2:00 PM
Free community kitchen open to all. Vegetarian meals served with love.
Every Sunday
Sunday Diwan
ਦੀਵਾਨ
9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Kirtan, Katha, Ardas, and full Langar. The highlight of our week.
First Sunday of Month
Sangrand
ਸੰਗਰਾਂਦ
8:00 – 11:00 AM
Monthly Sangrand Diwan marking the beginning of the Nanakshahi month.
As Scheduled
Akhand Path
ਅਖੰਡ ਪਾਠ
48-Hour Continuous
Uninterrupted recitation of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji. Book online.

Private Programs

Book a Sacred Program

Honor life's milestones with Gurbani. We are blessed to serve your family.

📖
Akhand Path
ਅਖੰਡ ਪਾਠ
48-hour uninterrupted recitation of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji. Includes Bhog ceremony.
Book Now →
📿
Sehaj Path
ਸਹਿਜ ਪਾਠ
Non-continuous recitation of the entire Guru Granth Sahib Ji at your own pace or Gurdwara.
Book Now →
💍
Anand Karaj
ਆਨੰਦ ਕਾਰਜ
Sikh wedding ceremony performed in the presence of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji.
Book Now →
🙏
Sukhmani Sahib Path
ਸੁਖਮਨੀ ਸਾਹਿਬ
Recitation of the Psalm of Peace for personal or family well-being occasions.
Book Now →
✨
Naam Karan
ਨਾਮ ਕਰਨ
Sacred naming ceremony for newborns. Receive your child's first letter from Hukamnama.
Book Now →

Dasvandh & Seva

Support the Sangat

Your generosity sustains the Langar, programs, and sacred services of our Gurdwara.

Every Seva Matters

Dasvandh — giving one-tenth of one's earnings — is a core Sikh teaching. Your contribution, large or small, directly supports our community, maintains the Gurdwara, and feeds hundreds through Langar.

  • Langar (Free Community Kitchen) Operations
  • Gurdwara Maintenance & Building Fund
  • Youth Kirtan & Education Programs
  • Gurpurab Celebrations & Nagar Kirtan
  • Community Outreach & Charity Programs
  • Sikh Heritage & Cultural Preservation
✓ Waheguru Ji Ka Khalsa, Waheguru Ji Ki Fateh! Your donation has been received. A receipt will be emailed to you. Thank you for your seva!

🔒 Secure payment · Tax-deductible 501(c)(3) · EIN: XX-XXXXXXX

Seva

Get Involved
in Seva

Seva — selfless service — is at the heart of Sikhi. Whether you cook Langar, lead Kirtan, teach children, or help maintain the Gurdwara, every act of service is an offering to the Guru.

We welcome all Sangat members — young and old — to share their time and skills.

Langar Kitchen Kirtan Seva Youth Education Parking & Greeting Gurdwara Cleaning Events Coordination Administration Audio/Visual Tech Social Media Website Help

Education & Heritage

Gurmukhi Classes

Connect your children to their roots. Learn to read and write the sacred script of Gurbani.

ਗੁਰਮੁਖੀ ਸਿੱਖੋ

Learn the Language of the Guru

Our Gurmukhi classes are designed to help children of all ages learn to read, write, and understand the sacred script used in Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji. Classes are taught by experienced Gursikh teachers in a warm, nurturing environment.

Whether your child is a complete beginner or wants to advance their reading of Gurbani, we have a class that fits. All Sangat families are welcome regardless of background.

Beginner
ਮੁੱਢਲਾ
Ages 5–8 · Learn the Gurmukhi alphabet (Painti), vowels, and basic words
Intermediate
ਵਿਚਕਾਰਲਾ
Ages 9–13 · Reading Nitnem Banis, understanding basic meanings
Advanced
ਉੱਚ ਪੱਧਰ
Ages 14+ · Full Gurbani reading, pronunciation & comprehension
Adult Classes
ਵੱਡਿਆਂ ਲਈ
All ages welcome · Weekend sessions for adults who want to learn

CLASS SCHEDULE

Saturday Morning 9:00 – 11:00 AM
Sunday (After Diwan) 12:30 – 2:00 PM
Location Classroom — Lower Hall

Classes are free of charge. Donations for supplies are welcome.

Enroll Your Child
ਦਾਖਲਾ ਫਾਰਮ
Parent / Guardian Information
Child Information
✓ Waheguru Ji Ka Khalsa, Waheguru Ji Ki Fateh! Your enrollment has been received. Our Gurmukhi teacher will contact you within 48 hours with class details.

Classes are free of charge · Open to all children · No prior knowledge required
